---
title: "Overview"
description: "Filter all 80 labs by course and tag, and explore how the labs connect through shared topics."
toc: false
page-layout: full
title-block-style: none
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.kicker}
EIGHTY LABS · LINKED FILTERS · LABEL NETWORK
:::
# Overview
::: {.lead}
Browse every lab in the four-course curriculum. Selecting a course or tag filters the network, the lab list, and the chip counts together. Click any node in the graph to open the lab; shift-click adds its course to the filter, alt-click adds its tags.
:::
:::

## Lab network

::: {.network-help}
Each node is a lab; nodes share an edge when they have at least two tags in common. Colour encodes course. Non-matching nodes fade rather than disappear so the layout stays stable as you filter.
:::

::: {#tutorial-network style="height: 560px;"}
:::

::: {.network-controls}
<button id="network-reset" type="button">Reset zoom</button>
<details class="downloads-menu">
<summary>Download data</summary>
<ul>
<li><a href="artifacts/graph.json" download>graph.json</a> — nodes, edges, courses, tags</li>
<li><a href="artifacts/labs.csv" download>labs.csv</a> — id, title, url, course, week, session, tags</li>
<li><a href="artifacts/cooccurrence.csv" download>cooccurrence.csv</a> — tag pairs and counts</li>
</ul>
</details>
:::

## Filter

::: {.search-row}
<label for="overview-search" class="visually-hidden">Search labs</label>
<input id="overview-search" type="search" placeholder="Search labs…" autocomplete="off" spellcheck="false" />
:::

::: {#filter-summary .filter-summary aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"}
<button id="filter-reset" type="button" hidden>Reset all filters</button>
:::

::: {#topic-filter-bar .filter-bar aria-label="Filter by course"}
:::

::: {#tag-filter-bar .filter-bar aria-label="Filter by tag"}
:::

::: {#label-filter-bar .filter-bar .label-bar aria-label="Filter by label"}
:::

## Labs

<div id="a11y-announcer" class="visually-hidden" role="status" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></div>

::: {#tutorial-list-empty .tutorial-list-empty hidden=true}
No labs match the current filters. Try removing one, or [reset all]{role="link"}.
:::

::: {#tutorial-list .tutorial-list}
Loading…
:::

<nav id="all-tutorials-nav" class="all-tutorials-nav" aria-label="All labs grouped by course"></nav>

<details id="heatmap-wrapper" class="heatmap-wrapper">
<summary>Tag co-occurrence heatmap</summary>

::: {.heatmap-controls}
<label for="heatmap-n">Top tags: <span id="heatmap-n-readout">20</span></label>
<input id="heatmap-n" type="range" min="10" max="50" step="1" value="20" />
:::

::: {#heatmap .heatmap}
:::

</details>

<link rel="stylesheet" href="css/overview.css">
<script src="https://unpkg.com/vis-network@9.1.9/standalone/umd/vis-network.min.js"></script>
<script type="module" src="assets/js/overview/main.js"></script>
